allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' | Where-Object Name -like ''*Visual*'' | Select-Object Name")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' | Where-Object Name -like ''*MSBuild*'' | Select-Object Name")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio'' | Select-Object Name")
